# Demo Test Values — section-by-section

**Login:** `demo` / `demo123` (now has all 88 screen permissions — run `backend/grant_demo_perms.py` again if reset).

**Legend:** _select_ = dropdown (pick the seeded value shown); _auto_ = generated by server, don't enter; _computed_ = server calculates, don't enter.

Pre-seeded data you'll pick from dropdowns (from `create_demo_data.py`):
Unit `Demo Unit` · Items `Demo Egg`, `Demo Organic` · Pit `Demo Pit A` · Supplier `Demo Supplier` ·
Trays `DEMO-TRAY-001` (EGG), `DEMO-TRAY-002` (FRP) · Batches `BAT-DEMO-001` (Egg), `BAT-FRP-DEMO-001` (FRP) ·
User `demo`.

> ⚠ Create in **dependency order**: Unit → Item → (Supplier/Pit/Tray) → Material Received → the process forms.

---

## ✅ Settings (all wired to Django)

| Section | Demo values |
|---|---|
| **Unit Creation** | unit_name: `Kilogram` (must be unique) |
| **Item Creation** | item_name: `Test Feed` · unit: _select_ `Demo Unit` · (item_code _auto_ IT-###) |
| **Tray Creation** | bin_name: `TRAY-100` · tray_type: `EGG Tray` (or `FRP Tray`) |
| **Supplier Creation** | supplier_name: `Green Farms` · label: `GF` · address: `12 Farm Rd` · contact_no: `9876543210` · email: `green@farms.com` · gst_no: `29ABCDE1234F1Z5` |
| **Pit Creation** | pit_name: `Pit B` · location: `Yard 1` · length: `12` · width: `6` · height: `1.5` · description: `test pit` · (volume _computed_ = 108) |

## ✅ Admin

| Section | Demo values |
|---|---|
| **User Type** | type_name: `Supervisor` · description: `Shift supervisor` · is_active: on |
| **User** | user_name: `test01` · password: `test123` · first_name: `Test` · last_name: `User` · emp_id: `EMP-100` · user_email: `test01@zigfly.com` · user_type: _select_ `Admin` · is_active: on |
| **Main Screen** | screen_main_name: `Reports` · icon_name: `ri-file-list-3-fill` |
| **User Screen** | screen_name: `Item Creation` · folder_name: `item_creation` · main_screen: _select_ · order_no: `1` |
| **User Permission** | pick a User/User Type, tick screens to grant (assigns the `screens` list) |
| **Login History** | view-only (read) — no create |

## ✅ Hatching Center

| Section | Demo values |
|---|---|
| **Material Received** | date: today · supplier: _select_ `Demo Supplier` · item: _select_ `Demo Egg` · qty: `500` · unit: _select_ `Demo Unit` · invoice_no: `INV-100` · invoice_date: today · batch_id: `BAT-100` (unique) |
| **Egg Process** | entry_date: today · staff: _select_ `demo` · supplier: _select_ `Demo Supplier` · batch: _select_ a **pending** batch · tot_qty: `100` · tray_utilized: `2` · trays: _select_ `DEMO-TRAY-001` · addons (optional): item `Demo Organic` qty `5` · (entry_no _auto_ EPC-#####) |
| **Culling Process** | entry_date: today · shift_type: `Day` · cylinder_type: `O2` · cylinder_no: `CYL-1` · starting_weight: `50` · ending_weight: `30` · raw_material_weight: `100` · final_larvae_weight: `40` · work_done: `Cutting` · (fuel_consumption _computed_ = 20; others_remarks required only if work_done = `Others`) |
| **Screening Process** | = Pit Status with org_status `Vibro Screen` (see Pit Status below) |

## ✅ Processing Center

| Section | Demo values |
|---|---|
| **Status Update** | entry_date: today · staff: _select_ `demo` · batch: _select_ · day: `1` · hatching_status: `Progressing` · remarks: `on track` |
| **Pit Status** | entry_date: today · pit: _select_ `Demo Pit A` · org_status: _select a stage_, then stage fields ↓ |
| — Organic Waste Added (1) | feed_qty: `50` · feed_count: `1000` |
| — Baby Larvae Added (2) | batch: _select_ · trays: _select_ · larvae_qty_in: `20` |
| — Aeration Process (3) | method: `Manual turning` |
| — Measurement (4) | measure_time: `Morning` · temp_start/mid/end: `28`/`30`/`29` · humi_start/mid/end: `60`/`62`/`61` |
| — Harvest (5) | larvae_qty: `75` · qty_manure_1/2/3: `30`/`25`/`10` · qty_rejets: `5` · harvest_comp: `Completed` |
| — Vibro Screen (6) | larvae_qty: `70` · qty_manure_1/2: `30`/`25` · qty_rejets: `5` · harvest_comp: `Completed` |
| — Tippi (7) | tippi_qty: `15` |
| **FRP Tray Process** | entry_date: today · batch: _select_ an FRP batch (one load **per batch**) · frp_tray_count: `2` · trays: _select_ `DEMO-TRAY-002` |
| **FRP Status Update** | entry_date: today · staff: _select_ `demo` · batch: _select_ an FRP process · day: `1` · hatching_status: `Progressing` · remarks: `day 1 ok` |

## ❌ NOT testable yet — no Django endpoint (see MIGRATION_REPORT.md)

These pages still call legacy PHP and will error (502/404) until backend endpoints are built:
**Dashboard** (`api.php`), **Measurable Report**, **Egg Process Report**, **Pit Status Report**,
**Rejects Report**, **Rejects Image Upload**. Don't treat their failures as regressions.
